## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Yourco and fwd.digital to discuss potential SEO content partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Yourco is seeking to scale up their SEO content production beyond current 1 article/week](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers AI-assisted content creation with human editing, aiming for 100k words/month](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [fwd.digital's approach combines programmatic content generation with strategic keyword targeting](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Potential for a tailored engagement starting in October, with flexibility on volume/pricing](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

## Topics

### Yourco Background

  - [Founded in 2021, initially building custom software for businesses](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Pivoted to creating a communication platform for non-desk employees using SMS](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Now serving hundreds of clients across manufacturing, construction, transportation, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Recently raised $2M seed round to scale the business](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Current lead generation: 30 leads/month (40% outbound, 40% SEO, 20% referrals)](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach

  - [Uses AI-assisted workflows to mimic human content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Combines AI research and writing with human editing and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Aims for high volume (100k words/month) and velocity while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Includes keyword research, content creation, CMS staging, and ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Focuses on both high-volume keywords and long-tail "zero volume" topics](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Yourco struggling with shorter-tail, competitive keywords like "employee app"](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [fwd.digital suggests balancing competitive terms with long-tail topics](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating content addressing customer questions and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Proposal to review and refresh existing content alongside new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)

### Operational Details

  - [fwd.digital handles full content process, including CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Assigns dedicated editor and strategist to each client](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Flexible on engagement terms, open to adjusting volume/pricing for Yourco](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to add Yourco team to Slack channel for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
  - [Marcel to send meeting recording and additional information links](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)
  - [Marcel to propose a lighter volume/lower cost option for initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=2190.0)
  - [Yourco to consider blocking off time in early October for potential kick-off](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [Both parties to continue discussion on Slack to finalize engagement details](https://fathom.video/share/s6V98zpzqS_tZse7vTpjtS2c6JyFkUJD?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
